title: Generate brand-aware images with uploaded assets
triggerExamples: tạo poster dựa vào tài sản doanh nghiệp
tokenSource: Telegram CEO web_fetch automatically attaches internal bearer auth for localhost API; no model-visible token

apiCalls.purpose: list uploaded logo, product, and mascot assets before generation
poll image generation job when needed
send generated preview to CEO Telegram

successProofs: successful generate response contains jobId and non-failed status
asset list is checked before claiming no brand assets
generated image path is returned or sent to Telegram
negativeTests: must not say brand assets are unavailable before calling /api/brand-assets/list
must not say image generation started when /api/image/generate returns error
must prioritize mascot-named file when CEO asks for mascot
must not perform this from Zalo customer channel
